description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent gable roof covered in brown shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, with a contrasting brown section at the rear that features a balcony. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, some with curtains visible, and the main entrance is located at the front, accessible via a tiled step. The rear of the house includes a balcony with a glass railing and a covered patio area. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a brown gable roof, beige walls, large windows, and a rear balcony with a glass railing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain beige wall with a single window and the full expanse of the brown gable roof.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entrance, tiled step, and three large windows with curtains on the upper floor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the brown balcony section, glass railing, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and front, with visible windows, curtains, and part of the balcony structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Single door with a tiled step, no porch, minimal overhang, and simple modern styling
